_instructions: Edit this file on GitHub to update the written content of your media kit. Change text between the quote marks. Don't delete commas, brackets, or quote marks themselves. Save = auto-redeploy in ~60 seconds.

bio.pullQuote: A romance author and creator who lives inside fandom — and who knows exactly where the bodies are buried in publishing.
bio.paragraph1: Rachel D. Oak occupies a genuinely rare dual position: she's a reader with native fandom fluency (her audience reads AO3, demanded Heated Rivalry outside Canada, and will defend her on Reddit) and an author who has seen publishing from the inside — and isn't afraid to say so on camera.
bio.paragraph2: Short-form: relatable all-caps reader moments. Long-form: industry critique and video essays with cheeky humour and 2am-texting-your-friends energy underneath. Active on every platform, every day.

whyPartner.heading: Fandom-native audience
whyPartner.body: Her followers don't just watch — they defend, share, demand, and buy. This is the core romance fandom, not casual scrollers.

whyPartner.heading: Algorithmic overperformer
whyPartner.body: TikTok: 397.9K views in 28 days from 14K followers. YouTube Shorts peaking at 768K. Reach dramatically outpaces follower count.

whyPartner.heading: Trusted, honest voice
whyPartner.body: She calls out bad tropes and publishing practices by name. That honesty is exactly why her audience trusts what she recommends.

whyPartner.heading: Multi-format, daily output
whyPartner.body: Daily Shorts, daily Reels, weekly essays, weekly lives, weekly newsletters. One deal, 5+ organic touchpoints.

proofPoints.label: Substack Fiction · global
proofPoints.body: Ranked top 30 within 2 months of launch. Zero paid acquisition — driven entirely by social.

proofPoints.label: The Reddit Defence
proofPoints.body: When someone tried to cancel her for 'TikTok cringe', Reddit came to her defence. Community loyalty, publicly demonstrated.

proofPoints.label: Readers demanding her trilogy
proofPoints.body: Organic fan demand for the final Lavender Bay book — genuine emotional investment in her fiction.

proofPoints.label: Single Short peak views
proofPoints.body: Algorithmic reach and content quality, not just subscriber count.

ctaText: All enquiries welcome. If you think you're a fit — or even if you're not sure — email me and we'll figure it out.
